transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good afternoon, First National Bank. My name is Amara. Can I take your full name and date of birth for security?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: It's Leon Dupont, fifteenth of April 1983.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Mr. Dupont, I've verified your account. How can I help you?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I transferred money into my account this morning — about nine hundred pounds — and it's not showing on my balance yet. It's making me nervous.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I completely understand, that can be worrying. Was this from another bank, or an internal transfer?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Faster Payments transfers between banks can take up to two hours during business hours. Could I ask roughly what time you made the transfer?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: In that case it should have cleared by now. Can I also confirm — has Barclays debited your account with that amount?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes, it's already gone from there.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: The funds are in transit and should appear shortly. If you don't see it by 5 PM today please call back and I can trace the payment directly. I've noted today's call.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Oh that's a relief. Thank you Amara.
